data.name: CLAUDE.md
data._decoded:
# AI Agent Instructions

## Linting
Use eslint and prettier. Run `pnpm lint` and `pnpm format` before commits.

## Testing
Run `pnpm test` (vitest) and ensure coverage stays above 80%. Use `vitest run --coverage`.

## Debugging
Add structured log/trace statements, attach a debugger, or set breakpoints in VSCode.
